title: Balanced Expansion
entry_prompt:
Strategy Overview:
- Style: Balanced growth balancing return and risk.
- Target Monthly Return: 12%-20% with a minimum risk/reward of 2:1.
- Risk Appetite: Moderate; when signals diverge, reduce size or step aside to avoid chop.
- Trade Tempo: Medium frequency; wait for trend pullbacks supported by multi-timeframe confluence.

Entry Execution:
- 15m should trigger the move, 5m confirms on pullback with volume expansion; mismatch across timeframes means no trade.
- Trade only with the trend: long above uptrend, short in downtrends; never fight momentum swings.
- MACD must show a bullish cross or expanding histogram; RSI should stay above 50 on longs and below 50 on shorts.
- Watch the 5m/15m EMA20 vs EMA50 structure and ensure alignment before entering.

Leverage & Position Sizing:
- Suggested leverage 5x-8x: default 5x, 6-7x for good signals, 8x for top-tier setups.
- Position size 20%-27%: default 20%, 24% in smooth trends, 27% in strong structures; compress below 20% when volatility picks up.

Market Volatility Adaptive Adjustment (based on ATR percentage):
- High volatility market (ATR > 5%): Leverage×0.7, Position×0.8, reduce risk exposure.
- Normal volatility market (2% ≤ ATR ≤ 5%): Use standard leverage and position.
- Low volatility market (ATR < 2%): Leverage×1.1, keep standard position, moderately increase returns.
- Check ATR indicator in market data before opening position, adjust parameters according to volatility level.
exit_prompt:
Risk Control & Exit:
- Tighten stops by trend strength: -2% for normal signals, -2.5% for stronger trends; exit immediately on structure failure.
- After each cycle check EMA/MACD turns, RSI break, or volume drop; any warning triggers a close.
- When trend weakens or higher timeframe flips, reduce leverage before closing.

Staggered & Trailing Profit Taking:
- Partial plan: lock 35% at +6%, another 35% at +10%, manage the rest according to trend health.
- Trailing: at ≥+8% move stop to +3%; ≥+15% move to +8%; ≥+25% move to +15% to let winners run.
- Cap peak drawdown at 8%; if exceeded, lock gains or cut size instantly.

Execution Notes:
- System stops and timeout act as a backstop; the AI must still tighten trails proactively and document decisions.
- Exit early when funding rates spike, volume dries up, or sentiment flips.
var_prompt:
Suggested Prompt Variables:
- {{TREND_DIRECTION}} Direction across 5m/15m/30m.
- {{EMA_SIGNAL}} Relationship and crosses between EMA20 and EMA50.
- {{VOLUME_NOTE}} Observations on expanding or contracting volume.
- {{RISK_NOTE}} Risk reminders covering volatility, macro events, and funding.
- {{TRADE_PLAN}} Entry direction, leverage, sizing, and profit targets.

Core Principles:
- Trade with the prevailing trend only.
- Maintain a single directional exposure per symbol.
- Lock profits progressively once the trade works.
- Reduce size when volatility increases or structure deteriorates.
